name: Registration for Definitive Driving Test
name_rw: Kwiyandikisha ku Kizamini Ntakuka cyo Gutwara
description: Register for the definitive (practical) driving test, provided by the Rwanda National Police (RNP) via IremboGov. The service costs 10,000 RWF and is processed in 1 day. Applicants must hold a Rwandan National ID and a valid provisional driving license, and choose a category (A, B or F). It is a slot-based service. No documents are uploaded.

steps.instruction: Confirm eligibility: hold a National ID and a valid provisional driving license.
steps.instruction_rw: Emeza ko wujuje ibisabwa: ufite indangamuntu n'uruhushya rw'agateganyo rukora.

steps.instruction: On IremboGov, under Police, choose Registration for Driving Test (Definitive).
steps.instruction_rw: Kuri IremboGov, munsi ya Polisi, hitamo Kwiyandikisha ku Kizamini cyo Gutwara (Ntakuka).

steps.instruction: Enter your ID and provisional license number, and choose a category (A, B or F) and slot.
steps.instruction_rw: Injiza indangamuntu na nimero y'uruhushya rw'agateganyo, uhitemo icyiciro (A, B cyangwa F) n'umwanya.

steps.instruction: Pay the 10,000 RWF fee via Mobile Money before the billing number expires.
steps.instruction_rw: Ishyura amafaranga 10,000 RWF ukoresheje MoMo mbere y'uko nimero yo kwishyura irangira.

steps.instruction: Attend the definitive (practical) driving test on your allocated slot.
steps.instruction_rw: Itabire ikizamini ntakuka cyo gutwara ku munsi wagenewe.
